name: Safenew AI
description: « Turn your AI-generated texts into natural writing, just like a human would write. The AI keeps the meaning and intent of your texts. Presented as undetectable by detection software

name: Face Swap AI
description: « This tool allows you to swap faces in high definition on your photos and videos, without adding any watermarks to the final result. Quickly create memes, creative content, or realistic simulations

name: Live Avatar Alibaba
description: « Create (very) long animated videos featuring talking characters based on your voice. Generation is done in real time. Perfect for interviews, tutorials, anime-style avatars, or even virtual presenters

name: Interview Q&A AI
description: « Don't let any question throw you off balance during your interviews. This tool generates customized simulations and helps you structure powerful responses. Master your speech and turn every question from the recruiter into an opportunity to demonstrate your value

name: Warmup Tool
description: « Avoid having your new WhatsApp accounts blocked. This tool simulates natural human conversations to gradually “warm up” your numbers, boosting their reputation before launching your mass campaigns

name: AI Image Editor
description: « Don't let a small detail ruin your perfect photo. Remove an intruder, erase the background, or instantly improve sharpness. You have a complete suite of tools to enhance your visuals without any technical skills

name: MusicArt
description: « Stop searching through sound banks. Just describe the music playing in your mind, a Lo-Fi beat for work, an energetic rock intro, and instantly get your own track

name: ATS Resume Checker
description: « Analyze how compatible your resume is with recruiters' ATS systems. This AI tool gives you recommendations on how to optimize keywords, structure, and formatting. Maximize your chances of getting through automatic filters and landing more interviews

name: Deep Swap AI
description: « Create hyperrealistic video montages by replacing any face. This AI deals with complex angles and expressions for virtually undetectable results, both in photos and animated clips. Ideal for creating viral content

name: Vidmage
description: « Swap faces in your photos, videos, and GIFs in seconds with AI detection. Enjoy simultaneous swapping of multiple faces, partial replacement of features, and batch processing. The app is also available on Mac

name: Appark
description: « Quickly decipher the mobile app market with AI. Analyze trends, spy on your competitors, and discover hidden growth opportunities

name: Kamo-1 Kinetix
description: « Create videos with full cinematic control using a model that understands and manipulates the scene in 3D. Upload your source image and a video of the actor to manipulate character movements, camera, and perspectives

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
